opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Something bit me in the garden a few hours ago, and now this massive, rock-hard lump on my lower leg is driving me insane with the itch. I'm really scared it was a venomous spider or that I'm about to have some kind of serious allergic reaction.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly while I was gardening and it keeps getting harder and itchier. I want to know if it's something dangerous like a spider bite and I want the itch under control.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago, right after I felt a sharp pinch on my leg while gardening in some dense bushes
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 hours and it's got firmer over the last couple of hours
symptom_narrative.character: started as a sharp pinch, then an intensely itchy raised lump; now it's a firm, hard swelling with some redness around it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is the worst I've ever had — unbearable, I can't stop scratching
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the outer side of my right lower leg, the calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting harder over the last two hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped — I put some antiseptic cream on it and it did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching it, though I can't help it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the itch and the hard lump — I can breathe fine, my lips and tongue aren't swollen, my throat feels normal, I don't have hives anywhere else and I'm not dizzy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get bitten in the garden sometimes but never anything like this hard lump
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm getting around fine at home, it's really just the itch that's tormenting me

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: generic antiseptic cream (I dabbed some on the bite, no relief at all)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; was gardening in dense foliage when it happened; very anxious that it could be a venomous spider bite

objective_data_offered.value: a firm, hard, red swollen lump about 4 cm across on the outer right calf, with a tiny central puncture dot at the top and several scratch marks around it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: size and firmness are the patient's own estimate on camera; cannot be palpated or measured remotely

objective_data_offered.value: no red line or streak running up the leg away from the lump; the other leg looks completely normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a patient's own visual check for lymphangitis is unreliable and can miss early spread

objective_data_offered.value: the lump feels warm to the touch but not burning hot; no fever, no chills, feels generally well in myself
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessed warmth and 'no fever' without a thermometer are unreliable
